reason: wire the update-status.v3/review/rollback APIs into shared CLI surfaces and update shared regression gates from the legacy stage names
required_change: Make `sks update status [--refresh] --json` the canonical update-status.v3 surface and make legacy `sks update check` plus top-level `sks update-check` aliases return the same status schema. Wire `sks update review --version <semver> --json`, `sks update now --version <semver> --json`, and guarded `sks update rollback --version <semver> --json` to runSksUpdateReview/runSksUpdateNow/runSksUpdateRollback, update usage and registry summaries, and print operation_receipt_path plus the rollback command in text mode. In the shared unit test, explicitly set SKS_UPDATE_SKIP_TEMP_INSTALL_SMOKE=1 only for the existing global-install-argv fixture, update dry-run expectations from old_version_doctor_preflight/npm_install to preflight/download_or_registry_check/temporary_install_smoke/global_install, and isolate the no-npm case with a temporary HOME/status path so it never reads or writes the operator cache. Update source gates to assert the documented stage IDs preflight/global_install/new_version_doctor/version_probe and the new operation-receipt lifecycle instead of the removed legacy identifiers.
